## How it was tested

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] New behavior has a test
- [ ] A changeset is included if a publishable package changed (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] No custody of funds is introduced anywhere
